ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Head coach of the sport */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the sport competes in */,
  "coop" TEXT /* Cooperative program details, if applicable */,
  "teams" TEXT /* Teams available for the sport (e.g., V, JV, FR) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sport was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sport information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sports_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or details about the league */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division within the league */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference within the division */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the league was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the league information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport they are coaching */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the coach (e.g., Head Coach, Assistant Coach) */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coach was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coach information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name or designation of the team */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport the team belongs to */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of the team (e.g., Varsity, Junior Varsity) */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach in charge of the team */,
  "colors" TEXT /* Team colors */,
  "mascot" TEXT /* Team mascot */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "grade" INTEGER /* Grade level of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player is a part of */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport being played */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (home or away) */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team name */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., Win, Loss, Draw) */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player associated with the stats */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport for which the stats are applicable */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played by the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds made by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks made by the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stats were added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stats were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_stats_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who sustained the injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., sprain, strain, fracture) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury (e.g., active, recovered) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the injury was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the injury information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, player) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players_games" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-game association */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_games_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_games_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
